description_long: This is a multi-story brick apartment building with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn with a paved entrance path. The front facade features prominent bay windows and a main entrance flanked by planters and small trees. The building has a symmetrical arrangement of large, white-framed windows across all visible sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. On one side, there is a covered porch or balcony area with additional greenery, adding architectural interest and outdoor space for residents. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer decorative elements but consistent window placement. The structure is typical of urban residential neighborhoods, blending traditional brickwork with modern, functional design.
description: A multi-story brick apartment building with bay windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped entrance, featuring symmetrical white-framed windows and a covered porch area.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, bay windows, landscaped path, and a covered porch with greenery.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the covered porch area, side windows, and the building's rectangular depth.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a simpler facade with evenly spaced windows and no main entrance or porch.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the building's length, side windows, and the continuation of the green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with bay windows on the front and evenly spaced rectangular windows on all sides, creating a balanced and orderly appearance.
